title: Server-side Trolling
body:
Want to **mess with your friends** _without them installing anything_?

**Server-Side Trolling** adds "_harmless_" troll commands that are purely server-side.

_Players won’t notice the mod is installed… until the chaos starts_...

> ## LIST OF COMMANDS
1. /explode <Target> <Power> **explodes a mob/player with power from 1-10**
2. /damage <Target> <Amount> **Inflicts damage of any chosen damage type**
3. /end <Target> **teleports a player to the end**
4. /nether <Target> **teleports a player to the nether**
5. /surface <Target> **teleports a player to the overworld**
6. /scare <Target> **plays a creeper sound**
7. /Anvil <Target> **Drops an anvil on a player**
8. /evffect <Target> <level> <Time> **Applies every potion effect at once**
9. /fakeitem <Target> <Item> **Spawns an unpickable item**
10. /sendmessage <Target> <message> **sends a message to a player's action bar**
11. /fill <Target> **fills the player's inventory with useless items**
12. /love <Target> <ParticleAmount> <ParticleSpeed> **Spawns heart particles around a player**
13. /punch <Target> **Makes the target swing the item in their hand**
14. /smite <Target> **strikes lightning on a player**
15. /baby <Target> <Time> **Shrinks the player**
16. /giant <Target> <Time> **Enlarges the player**
17. /creeper <Target> <EntityAmount> **Spawns creepers near a player**
18. /fakesmite <Target> **Summons a fake lightning**

> **Notes**

- 100% server-side - perfect for private servers and friendly trolling
- Use at your own risk
- No dependences required
- There will be more commands in the future!
